headlines.title: What's at stake in the Elon Musk-Sam Altman trial
headlines.description: Jury selection begins Monday in a federal courtroom in Oakland, California, in a civil trial featuring one tech billionaire, Elon Musk, who is suing another, Sam Altman.

headlines.title: AI is making it very easy for the government to spy on you. Some lawmakers are worried.
Discomfort with modern technology shapes Gen Z's desire to live in the past
headlines.description: Some members of Gen Z are feeling so pessimistic about the future of the country and modern technology that they want to hop in a time machine

headlines.title: Meta says it will lay off 10% of its workforce
headlines.description: Facebook parent Meta is planning to lay off approximately 8,000 employees and eliminate another 6,000 open roles as it seeks to reduce costs.

headlines.title: Kalshi fines and suspends three politicians for 'insider trading' on their own races
headlines.description: Prediction market Kalshi said it had fined and suspended three political candidates for trading on their own races during primary campaigns.

headlines.title: Maine Gov. Janet Mills vetoes ban on data center construction
headlines.description: Maine Gov. Janet Mills on Friday vetoed a hallmark bill that would have halted the construction of large data centers in the New England state for 18 months

headlines.title: Correspondents’ Dinner Shooting Suspect to be Arraigned
headlines.description: The 31-year-old suspect in the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, who allegedly described himself as a “friendly federal assassin,” is expected to face charges on Monday. Investigators say he e-mailed a message to family which talked about intended targets, without naming the president, but appeared to refer to him and top cabinet officials who were in the ballroom. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump recalls being evacuated after WHCD gunshots
headlines.description: Trump recalls being evacuated after WHCD gunshots

headlines.title: Trump uses the correspondents' dinner shooting to renew his White House ballroom push
headlines.description: Trump and his allies said the Correspondents' dinner shooting shows the necessity of his ballroom, even though it's far from certain that the annual dinner would be held there.

headlines.title: Get an Inside Look at the 'Air Taxi' Set to Revolutionize Travel
headlines.description: An electric-powered Air Taxi, created by California-based Joby, is a cross between a plane and a helicopter and it could revolutionize how we get around, turning a potentially hourslong trip into a short 10-minute ride — all for the price of an Uber. Reporting for TODAY, NBC’s Sam Brock shares a first-hand look at the future of travel and how soon they're expected to launch.

headlines.title: Sony AI's table-tennis-playing robot makes history by beating elite human players
headlines.description: Ace, a ping-pong-playing robot, is the first to beat elite human players in a competitive sport, according to Sony AI. It's a big milestone for robotics that could extend beyond sports. NBC News' Emilie Ikeda reports.

headlines.title: Spelman College students invent a way for plants to talk with the help of AI
headlines.description: If plants could talk, what would they say? That’s what students at Spelman College are finding out with their project PlantGPT. The device uses artificial intelligence that lets you have conversations with your houseplants about their current needs using real-time data. These students hope to bring the device to plant owners and eventually farmers.
